description: Essential technical skills for modern data engineering. From advanced SQL patterns to distributed system mastery.

parts.title: SQL Mastery
parts.explanation: Advanced analytical patterns and performance optimization.

topics.title: Window Functions Deep Dive
topics.explanation: Window functions allow you to perform calculations across a set of table rows that are somehow related to the current row.

subtopics.title: Ranking and Paging
subtopics.explanation: Using ROW_NUMBER(), RANK(), and DENSE_RANK() to handle duplicates and pagination at scale.

subtopics.title: Moving Averages
subtopics.explanation: Calculating rolling metrics using ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW.

parts.title: Data Modeling
parts.explanation: Designing scalable and maintainable data architectures.

topics.title: Dimensional Modeling
topics.description: Star schemas and Snowflake schemas for data warehousing.
topics.explanation: Dimensional modeling is a design technique for data warehouses that aims to optimize data retrieval for analytical purposes.

subtopics.title: Fact vs Dimension
subtopics.explanation: Facts represent quantitative data (e.g., sales amount), while dimensions provide context (e.g., date, product, customer).
